title: 2 Pack Food Safety Temperatures Sign for Kitchen – 150x200mm Self-Adhesive Waterproof Vinyl Sticker, HACCP Hygiene Guide for Restaurants, Schools, Catering, Commercial Use
features: Essential Temperature Sign for Safe Food Handling: Clear HACCP temperature zones help staff, chefs and trainees easily identify safe ranges for cooking, reheating and storing food in restaurant, catering and school kitchens

Durable Waterproof and Oil-Resistant Vinyl: Printed with UV ink on laminated vinyl, this sticker is resistant to water, grease, heat and regular kitchen cleaning – perfect for busy commercial or institutional food prep areas

Quick and Easy To Apply without Tools: This self-adhesive safety sign installs in seconds – just peel and stick to clean surfaces like tiles, fridges, walls or stainless steel units. No screws or drilling required

Ideal for Catering, Cafés, Schools And More: Designed for compliance in restaurants, food trucks, cafés, care homes and canteens, helping new and experienced staff follow hygiene rules confidently and consistently

UK Compliant for Kitchen Hygiene: Follows Food Standards Agency guidelines to support inspections and maintain hygiene. Ideal for food safety training and helping commercial or school kitchens stay organised and audit-ready
